options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: logic_type
options.description: Choose if difficult tricks will be required in logic.

options.name: required_keys
options.description: Choose how many keys will be required to open the door to Crimson Rains.

options.name: ending
options.description: Choose which ending is required to complete the game.

options.name: starting_weapon
options.description: Choose which weapon to start with.

options.name: shop_multiplier
options.description: Choose how expensive shop items will be.

options.name: martyrdom_xp
options.description:
Choose how the 40 additional Marks of Martyrdom unlocked from gaining XP will be handled.

Vanilla: Marks use the original XP system.
Double XP: Marks use the original XP system, but at double the rate.
From Items: No marks are earned from XP. The 40 marks are distributed into the item pool.
From Bosses: No marks are earned from XP. The 40 marks are given by defeating the eight main bosses.

options.name: add_penitence_rewards
options.description: Choose if the rewards for completing True Torment Penitences should be in the item pool.

options.name: shuffle_cherubs
options.description: Choose if cherubs should be shuffled or in their default locations.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.
options: Votive Offering of a Hopeful Mother
Jabera to the Poison of Jealousy
Seguiriya to the Memory of your Eyes
Mirabras of the Return to Port
Peteneras to the Burial of the Lights
Cante Jondo of the Polluted Heart
The Woman of the Stolen Face
